summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The ARS Focused Opportunity Strategy ETF (AFOS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US-listed equity securities of any market capitalization. The fund employs a fundamental process to identify companies aligned with the issuers macro-outlook AFOS was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by ARS.

holdings.infoBox: AFOS is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund stock at 7.83%, Marathon Petroleum at 5.81%, Lam Research at 4.67%, Alphabet at 4.66%, and NVIDIA at 4.23%.

summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
